name: MSI PRO Z690-A WIFI DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6 - BT 5.2 (Z690AWID4)
shortName: MSI PRO Z690-A WIFI DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support
description: MSI PRO Z690 ATX motherboard with DDR4, WiFi 6, and PCIe 5.0 support for mainstream builds.
